title: fix: refresh model monitor package lock
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Refreshes `apps/model-monitor/package-lock.json` so its local `@pollinations/sdk` and `@pollinations/ui` snapshots match current main.
- Leaves CatGPT PR #11614 untouched.
- Scope is limited to the active package consumer that still had SDK 4.4.0 / UI 0.0.1 lock metadata.

Verified:
- `npm run build --prefix apps/model-monitor`
- `git diff --check`
- package-consumer detector: `model-monitor`, `playground`, `react`

Note: `npx biome check --write apps/model-monitor/package-lock.json` processed no files because lockfiles are ignored by Biome config.

gist.headline: Fresh locks for the monitor
gist.blurb: Gave the model monitor's package lock a quick refresh to keep its SDK and UI dependencies perfectly in sync with the rest of the hive.
gist.summary: Refreshed the package-lock.json for the model-monitor app to sync its local @pollinations/sdk and @pollinations/ui snapshots with the current main branch.
gist.impact: Ensures the model monitor builds reliably with the latest internal package versions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some light maintenance, tightening a padlock on a retro monitor to represent the package-lock refresh for the model-monitor app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot using a tiny wrench to tighten a shiny padlock on a retro CRT monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
